items.reasoning: Sustain through Earth Spike + Dragon Slave harass. Both heroes nuke hard at level 2.
Vision on enemy rotation paths -- Lion and Lina combo kills at level 3.
2x branches for +2 stats; Earth Spirit's base HP is mediocre.
Burst mana for Rolling Boulder escape when ganked by Finger + Laguna combo.
Positioning speed for Boulder Smash + Rolling Boulder combos; kite Lion's melee range.
Lion Earth Spike + Lina Dragon Slave = 6+ wand charges per minute. Burst heal saves lives.
Cheap HP to survive one nuke rotation. 480g for +5 STR.
45% magic resistance while invisible. Saves allies from Finger of Death + Laguna Blade combo.
Kill participation gold; heal allies between burst combos.
Survives Finger + Laguna instant-kill combo. 2.5s of invulnerability to escape or cast Magnetize.
Enchant Remnant on Lion silences him for 4s; on Lina prevents Laguna Blade cast.
Push yourself or ally out of Earth Spike range after stun. Repositioning tool.
If targeted by Finger + Laguna every fight, BKB prevents instant death.
Ethereal dodges Lion right-click drain and Lina Fiery Soul attacks.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Earth Spirit's Rolling Boulder provides the mobility to dodge burst combos. Glimmer Cape is the critical save item -- 45% magic resistance makes Finger + Laguna survivable. Play the vision game with wards to avoid getting caught by their burst rotation. Aeon Disk as insurance.
